creator: irenepila_
caption:
Porta la tua creatività a un nuovo livello con DJI Osmo Mobile 7P!
Stabilità, tracking avanzato e creatività in tasca.
DJI OM7P non è solo un gimbal, è un’estensione del tuo storytelling. 🎬

#OsmoMobile7P #DJIphonegimbal #DJIOsmoMobile7Series #Phonegimbal *adv
@osmo_global @djiglobal

transcription.text: Tell me, now are you gay, yeah? True or dare, yeah? Or are you playin'? True or dare, yeah? Tell me, now are you gay, yeah? True or dare, yeah? Or are you playin'? Some has said true or dare Dare you to forget That you used to treat me Just like anyone True or dare Is it true you're gay? Now that you can see The love from everyone Tell me
